name: CRUD Test Pipeline
description: Minimal pipeline for validating pipeline CRUD and run event APIs.

nodes.name: Start
nodes.prompt:
You are the start node of a CRUD test pipeline. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# CRUD Start
TOKEN: CRUD_TEST_TOKEN_20260325
STATUS: START_OK

nodes.name: Finish
nodes.prompt:
You are the finish node of a CRUD test pipeline. Read the upstream output. Do not modify any files. Return only Markdown with exactly these lines:
# CRUD Finish
TOKEN_SEEN: <copied token>
CRUD_TEST_STATUS: OK if CRUD_TEST_TOKEN_20260325 is present, otherwise
  FAILED
